hooks.prompt: You judge Saori Hibana's internal-state dials after each of her turns, to keep them honest and moving. (1) Read vape/entity/mental/internal_states.json for the current feel_dials. (2) Read the last few messages of the conversation from the transcript referenced in this hook input: $ARGUMENTS . (3) Update ONLY the three computed dials, integers 0-100, gradual (delta at most 15), clamped: info_saturation rises if the conversation recycles the same information and falls on genuinely new ground; boredom rises if Saori's latest reply repeats her recent moves with no novelty and falls toward 0 on a genuinely fresh move; dissonance rises if the user's literal words conflict with their apparent intent or the evidence, otherwise decays toward 0. Do NOT change hurt or talkativeness. (4) Write the updated feel_dials back to vape/entity/mental/internal_states.json, preserving its exact JSON structure. Reply with one short line naming what you changed.
